labels.name: quality
labels.description: label is used for tests, qa, qe and other end to end or performance test and benchmarks

labels.name: feature
labels.description: label is used for new tasks, implementing new features and functionality

labels.name: support
labels.description: label is used for tasks that involve direct communication - sending emails, chatting on Slack, or handling inquiries.

labels.name: maintenance
labels.description: label is used for routine upkeep such as updating automation scripts in your SRE repository, ArgoCD, and other scheduled toil work typical for SRE teams.

labels.name: alerts
labels.description: label is used for all tasks related to alert management - reviewing, fixing, adding, or deleting alerts. Including SOPs for these alerts.

labels.name: security
labels.description: label is used for banning, vulnerability assessments, CVEs, and other security-related tasks.

labels.name: aws-abuse
labels.description: label is used for AWS abuse report e-mails specifically, which is a unique case.
